requirement_topic.en: MS / IEC 60335-2-40 Safety Standards — Heat Pumps and Air Conditioners
requirement_topic.zh: MS / IEC 60335-2-40安全标准——热泵及空调器
requirement_topic.zht: MS / IEC 60335-2-40安全標準——熱泵及空調器

summary.en: Malaysia's mandatory product safety standard for heat pumps and air conditioners is MS 1062, which incorporates IEC 60335-2-40 (Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers) by reference. SIRIM QAS International uses this standard as the technical basis for mandatory product certification. Products must be tested by a SIRIM-recognised laboratory to the version of IEC 60335-2-40 cited in the current SIRIM scope. Product markings, instructions, and safety warnings must be in English (and Bahasa Malaysia where required by SIRIM or ST). Country-of-origin marking is required. The importer or authorised representative is the certification holder in Malaysia.
summary.zh: 马来西亚热泵和空调强制产品安全标准为MS 1062，该标准援引IEC 60335-2-40（热泵、空调器及除湿机的专项要求）。SIRIM QAS International以此标准为强制产品认证的技术依据。产品须由SIRIM认可实验室按当前SIRIM范围所引版本的IEC 60335-2-40进行测试。产品标识、说明书及安全警告须使用英文（如SIRIM或ST要求，还须提供马来语）。须标注原产国。在马来西亚，进口商或授权代理为认证持有人。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞熱泵和空調強制產品安全標準為MS 1062，該標準援引IEC 60335-2-40（熱泵、空調器及除濕機的專項要求）。SIRIM QAS International以此標準為強制產品認證的技術依據。產品須由SIRIM認可實驗室按當前SIRIM範圍所引版本的IEC 60335-2-40進行測試。產品標識、說明書及安全警告須使用英文（如SIRIM或ST要求，還須提供馬來語）。須標注原產國。在馬來西亞，進口商或授權代理為認證持有人。

standards_or_laws: MS 1062 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances (incorporating IEC 60335-2-40)
IEC 60335-2-40 — Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers
IEC 60335-1 — General safety requirements (as adopted in MS)
Electricity Supply Act 1990 and Electricity Regulations 1994 (Malaysia)
SIRIM mandatory product certification scheme for electrical appliances

summary.en: China's GB 4706.32 (Particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers) and GB 4706.1 (General requirements) are the domestic safety standards for heat pump appliances, broadly aligned with earlier IEC 60335 editions. CCC certification under GB 4706.32 is mandatory for heat pumps and air conditioners sold in China. Test reports and CCC certificates issued against Chinese GB standards are not accepted as SIRIM / MS 1062 compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国GB 4706.32（热泵、空调器及除湿机的专项要求）和GB 4706.1（通用要求）是热泵电器的国内安全标准，与较早版本的IEC 60335大体一致。依据GB 4706.32进行的CCC认证对在中国销售的热泵和空调为强制性要求。依据中国GB标准出具的测试报告和CCC证书不被接受为SIRIM / MS 1062合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國GB 4706.32（熱泵、空調器及除濕機的專項要求）和GB 4706.1（通用要求）是熱泵電器的國內安全標準，與較早版本的IEC 60335大體一致。依據GB 4706.32進行的CCC認證對在中國銷售的熱泵和空調為強制性要求。依據中國GB標準出具的測試報告和CCC證書不被接受為SIRIM / MS 1062合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.32 — Particular requirements for heat pumps, air conditioners and dehumidifiers (China)
GB 4706.1 — General requirements for safety of household and similar electrical appliances (China)
GB 25454 — Heat pump water heater for commercial use

gap.en: CCC / GB 4706.32 test reports are not accepted as Malaysian SIRIM / MS 1062 compliance evidence. Products must be independently tested to the IEC 60335-2-40 version referenced in SIRIM's current scope by a SIRIM-recognised laboratory. Product labelling and instructions must be in English (and Bahasa Malaysia as required). Country-of-origin (China) must be marked. The local importer or authorised representative must be the certificate holder. Any components (e.g. compressors, capacitors, wiring) not covered by the main appliance certification may require separate SIRIM component approval.
gap.zh: CCC / GB 4706.32测试报告不被接受为马来西亚SIRIM / MS 1062合规证据。产品须由SIRIM认可实验室按SIRIM当前范围引用的IEC 60335-2-40版本独立进行测试。产品标签和说明书须使用英文（如有要求，还须提供马来语）。须标注原产国（中国）。当地进口商或授权代理须为证书持有人。主要电器认证未覆盖的部件（如压缩机、电容器、布线）可能需要单独取得SIRIM部件认证。
gap.zht: CCC / GB 4706.32測試報告不被接受為馬來西亞SIRIM / MS 1062合規證據。產品須由SIRIM認可實驗室按SIRIM當前範圍引用的IEC 60335-2-40版本獨立進行測試。產品標籤和說明書須使用英文（如有要求，還須提供馬來語）。須標注原產國（中國）。當地進口商或授權代理須為證書持有人。主要電器認證未覆蓋的部件（如壓縮機、電容器、布線）可能需要單獨取得SIRIM部件認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SIRIM certification to MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40 required before customs clearance and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC certification under GB 4706.32 for domestic market; not recognised as equivalent to Malaysian SIRIM / MS 1062

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — independent testing to MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40 at a SIRIM-recognised laboratory is required; CCC and GB standard test reports are not accepted; English (and Bahasa Malaysia) labelling, country-of-origin marking, and a Malaysian-entity certificate holder are all mandatory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——须在SIRIM认可实验室独立按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40完成测试；CCC和GB标准测试报告不被接受；英文（及马来语）标签、原产国标注及马来西亚实体证书持有人均为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——須在SIRIM認可實驗室獨立按MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40完成測試；CCC和GB標準測試報告不被接受；英文（及馬來語）標籤、原產國標注及馬來西亞實體證書持有人均為強制要求。
